This issue affects WP eMember: from n/a through v10.2.2. 04/06/2026 04/06/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 5.30 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) MEDIUM

A security vulnerability has been detected in modelscope ms-swift up to 4.2.0. This affects the function Template._save_pil_image of the file swift/template/base.py of the component PIL Image Cache Key Handler. The manipulation leads to use of weak hash. An attack has to be approached locally. A high degree of complexity is needed for the attack. It is indicated that the exploitability is difficult. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance. 04/06/2026 04/06/2026 Vector CVSS:4.0 CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L Vector CVSS:2.0 AV:L/AC:H/Au:S/C:N/I:P/A:P Gravedad 4.0 1.10 Gravedad 4.0 txt LOW Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 3.60 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) LOW
